instructions.instruction: Use the get_mr_comments.sh script to fetch MR comments
instructions.original_snippets: Fetches all comments from a GitLab merge request. **Location:** `.agents/skills/gitlab-api/scripts/get_mr_comments.sh` **Usage:** ```bash .agents/skills/gitlab-api/scripts/get_mr_comments.sh <merge_request_url>```
instructions.relevant_when: Fetching or analyzing GitLab merge request comments or discussions

instructions.instruction: Set GITLAB_TOKEN or GITLAB_PAT environment variable before making API calls
instructions.original_snippets: Set **one** of the following: - `GITLAB_TOKEN`: Your GitLab personal access token - `GITLAB_PAT`: Alternative name for GitLab personal access token ... Requires GITLAB_TOKEN environment variable or GITLAB_PAT
instructions.relevant_when: Before making any GitLab API requests

instructions.instruction: Create GitLab token with read_api scope
instructions.original_snippets: Create a token with `read_api` scope in GitLab (User Settings → Access Tokens) ... Verify token has API read scope
instructions.relevant_when: Setting up authentication for GitLab API access
Making HTTP requests to GitLab API
Parsing JSON responses from GitLab API

instructions.original_snippets: if [[ ! "$MR_URL" =~ ^https://gitlab\.com/(.+)/-/merge_requests/([0-9]+) ]]; then ... Expected: https://gitlab.com/group/subgroup/project/-/merge_requests/ID ... Confirm URL format: `https://gitlab.com/group/project/-/merge_requests/ID`
instructions.relevant_when: Processing or validating GitLab MR URLs

instructions.instruction: Parse output by looking for specific fields: Author, Date, Type, System, and comment body
instructions.original_snippets: **Output Format:** ``` --- Author: Name (@username) Date: ISO8601 timestamp (UTC) Type: DiffNote|comment System: true|false Comment body text ```

instructions.instruction: Filter by System: false to exclude automated messages
instructions.original_snippets: 2. Filter by `System: false` to exclude automated messages ... - `System: true` — automated/system-generated message; `System: false` — human comment
instructions.relevant_when: Analyzing human comments and excluding bot/automated messages

instructions.instruction: Identify inline code review comments by Type: DiffNote
instructions.original_snippets: - `Type: DiffNote` — inline code review comment; `Type: comment` — general MR comment
instructions.relevant_when: Distinguishing between inline code comments and general MR discussion

instructions.instruction: Validate API response by checking for expected fields (Author:, Date:) before processing
instructions.original_snippets: 1. Fetch and validate comments: ```bash output=$(.agents/skills/gitlab-api/scripts/get_mr_comments.sh "$MR_URL") echo "$output" | grep -q "Author:" || { echo "Invalid response — check token and URL"; exit 1; } ``` ... [ -n "$output" ] && echo "$output" | grep -q "Date:" || { echo "Empty or malformed response — check credentials"; exit 1; }
instructions.relevant_when: After fetching comments from the API to ensure valid response

instructions.instruction: Timestamps are in UTC using ISO8601 format
instructions.original_snippets: - Timestamps are UTC in ISO8601 format ... Date: ISO8601 timestamp (UTC)

instructions.instruction: Group comments by author when generating MR review summaries
instructions.original_snippets: 3. Group by author, extract action items and feedback themes
instructions.relevant_when: Creating review summaries or analyzing reviewer feedback

instructions.instruction: Compare timestamps to identify recent activity when tracking review progress
instructions.original_snippets: 2. Compare timestamps to identify recent activity
instructions.relevant_when: Monitoring MR review progress or identifying active reviews

instructions.instruction: Flag unresolved DiffNotes when tracking review progress
instructions.original_snippets: 3. Flag unresolved DiffNotes and report on response times

instructions.instruction: Handle 401 Unauthorized by checking token existence and scope
instructions.original_snippets: **401 Unauthorized**: Token missing or invalid - Check `GITLAB_TOKEN` or `GITLAB_PAT` is set - Verify token has API read scope

instructions.instruction: Handle 404 by verifying URL format and project access
instructions.original_snippets: **404 Project Not Found**: Invalid project path - Confirm URL format: `https://gitlab.com/group/project/-/merge_requests/ID` - Check token has access to the project

instructions.instruction: URL encode project path by replacing / with %2F
instructions.original_snippets: # URL encode the project path properly (replace / with %2F) PROJECT_PATH_ENCODED=$(echo -n "$PROJECT_PATH" | jq -sRr @uri | tr -d '\n')
instructions.relevant_when: Constructing GitLab API URLs with project paths

instructions.instruction: Check script exit codes: 0 for success, 1 for errors
instructions.original_snippets: **Exit Codes:** - `0`: Success - `1`: Invalid URL format, missing token, or API error
instructions.relevant_when: Handling script execution and error detection
